statement: The system shall provide a baseline configuration that can be adapted with variants such as longer arms, higher lift capacity, or waterproofing.
The system shall enter a safe mode when commanded movements exceed its capabilities.
The system shall enforce hard stops to prevent motion beyond safe limits.
The system shall display the range of each joint in the UI and change its colour when the joint approaches its limits.
The system shall allow task time constraints with a 50% buffer.
The system shall provide cable guidance stops to keep the cable within a defined path.
The system shall provide full-scene simulation capability.
The system shall support teach files allowing pre‑programmed paths for repeatable tasks.
The system shall allow the operator to take manual control after the robot reaches a near‑target position.
The system shall provide fixed camera views in addition to the variable viewpoint.
The system shall support zoom in/out functionality for camera views.
The system shall provide an augmented-reality overlay to guide the operator on where to focus or align.
The system shall prioritize high image resolution over frame rate.
The system shall provide force feedback to indicate motion constraints.
The system shall display a ghost mode predicting the robot's end position before execution.
The system shall implement no‑go zones with audio and haptic alerts to prevent entering prohibited areas.
The system shall use computer vision to recognize material types and enforce no‑go zones accordingly.
The system shall detect when the gripper fingers start to open or drop an object and provide feedback to the operator.
